subcodes.title: Words to Mr W.W. Harmon, spoken on 1912-07-27
subcodes.first_line: One of the martyrs of this Cause, at the time of his martyrdom... What a blessing God bestowed upon the Persians but they could not appreciate it!
subcodes.first_line_orig: از شهدای این امر یکی در وقت شهادت گفت که حضرت مسیح فرمود که جسد از شهادت خائف است اما
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @martyrs and martyrdom, @past, present and future of Iran
